name: pneumora
description: Intentional project memory and regression-prevention workflows for CRITICAL notes, regression logs, deploy checks, and safe codebase exploration.

interface.longDescription: Keep high-priority project notes, regression history, and deploy checks close to the repository so agents do not repeat known mistakes or push without re-reading critical context.
defaultPrompt: Use $pneumora to show this project's CRITICAL notes and regression log.
Use $pneumora to record this regression in the project memory.
Use $pneumora to run a pre-push deploy context check.
